productDisplayName: Vishudh Women Flower Print Brown Kurta
description: "Inactivated on 11th Apr,2012, mail by Vishwanath Gopalkrishnan because of  "As a part of the annual stock correction we need to send 1890 pcs from vishudh back to the brand" Composition Brown and white printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round neck with a split neckline, short puff sleeves, net ruffles on the chest, flaring pintucks that start at the chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron The inspiration for this kurta from aneri for women is the retro-esque fusion of the uniquely ethnic with smart workwear. The modern Indian working woman has come into her own, as has her wardrobe. This piece epitomizes how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian tunic. Those interested in colourblocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. For those who want to keep their look classic and chic, pair this with tonal leggings, and embellished slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
